summary: Lead accepts M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 after systems_architect ACCEPT and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. This acceptance is prerequisite evidence only: it confirms the M7 UI/localization/visual quality track is closed and locally validated with explicit limitations, but it is not M7 Gate PASS, formal content lock approval, release readiness, production art/culture approval, or manual human acceptance.

tests_run.result: Passed with existing plugin timing/chunk warnings.
Passed; format, lint, typecheck, and architecture boundaries passed.

decisions: Accept this task as prerequisite evidence only; do not claim M7 Gate PASS or formal content lock approval.
All tracked M7 UI/localization/visual quality tasks are CLOSED and synthesized.
Edge/Firefox remain blocked-by-tooling rows and Windows DPI 150% remains a follow-up row; these are limitations to carry or resolve later.

No current Human Gate is active. Formal content lock, manual human acceptance, production art/cultural choices, release/commercial, telemetry/accounts/secrets, cloud-save implementation, server/multiplayer, and manual node battle reversal remain future Human Gates if requested.
Proceed to PR integration. Task remains ACCEPTED until accepted evidence enters origin/main.
risks: Downstream M7 content-lock or exit validation must not overclaim full platform coverage or formal human approval from this task.
QA did not rerun all heavy product commands but accepted lead local evidence, upstream handoffs, and process-only diff; lead reran pnpm check after QA.
requested_action: Open PR, require CI, merge to main, then close the task only after origin/main contains the accepted evidence.
